apigateway.resource.ParentId.Docs: If you want to create a child resource, the ID of the parent resource. For resources without a parent, specify the `RestApi` root resource ID, such as `{ "Fn::GetAtt": ["MyRestApi", "RootResourceId"] }`.

apigateway.resource.PathPart.Docs: A path name for the resource.

apigateway.resource.RestApiId.Docs: The ID of the [RestApi](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-resource-apigateway-restapi.html) resource in which you want to create this resource.
